TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Ulivelivek ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Beinan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 97 buwan, 302 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 67% kyan ku 202 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 33% kyan ku 100 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Puyuma62%, Amis2%, Bunun1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ulivelivek hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Ulivelivek hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Ulivelivek hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ulivelivek hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ulivelivek hya' ga Danadanaw. tay 'llaw na Ulivelivek hya' ga Kalito'od. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. khu skwan biru maki 1 khu skwan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ uli*eli*ek ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu βeinan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pujuma**%, amis~ɕ*%, βunun*%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na uli*eli*ek ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na uli*eli*ek ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na uli*eli*ek ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na uli*eli*ek ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na uli*eli*ek ħjaʔ ɣa *ana*anaw. taj ʔllaw na uli*eli*ek ħjaʔ ɣa kalitoʔo*. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. kħu s~ɕkwan βiru maki * kħu s~ɕkwan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Ulivelivek ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Beinan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 97 buwan, 302 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 67% kyan ku 202 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 33% kyan ku 100 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Puyuma62%, Amis2%, Bunun1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ulivelivek hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Ulivelivek hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Ulivelivek hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ulivelivek hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ulivelivek hya' ga Danadanaw. tay 'llaw na Ulivelivek hya' ga Kalito'od. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. khu skwan biru maki 1 khu skwan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ uli*eli*ek ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu βeinan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pujuma**%, amis~ɕ*%, βunun*%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na uli*eli*ek ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na uli*eli*ek ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na uli*eli*ek ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na uli*eli*ek ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na uli*eli*ek ħjaʔ ɣa *ana*anaw. taj ʔllaw na uli*eli*ek ħjaʔ ɣa kalitoʔo*. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. kħu s~ɕkwan βiru maki * kħu s~ɕkwan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
